name: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
description: Integrated scheme for school education covering pre-school to class 12.

name: Mid-Day Meal Scheme
description: Provides free lunch to school children to improve nutrition and attendance.

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship
description: Scholarship for economically weaker students to reduce dropouts at class 8.

name: PM e-Vidya
description: Digital learning initiative to provide online education resources.

name: National Digital Library
description: Provides access to millions of digital books and learning resources.

name: National Scholarship Portal
description: Single-window platform for scholarships offered by central and state governments.

name: Rashtriya Uchchatar Shiksha Abhiyan
description: Improves access, equity, and quality in higher education institutions.

name: National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning (NPTEL)
description: Provides free online courses and certification in engineering and sciences.

name: SWAYAM
description: Massive open online courses platform for free learning.

name: Ishan Uday Scholarship
description: Scholarship for students from North Eastern Region pursuing higher education.

name: Digital India Programme
description: Transforms India into a digitally empowered society and knowledge economy.

name: National Supercomputing Mission
description: Establishes a network of supercomputers for scientific research and innovation.

name: National Mission on Quantum Technologies and Applications
description: Promotes research and development in quantum computing and communication.

name: Incredible India Tourism Campaign
description: Promotes India as a global tourist destination through branding and marketing.

name: PRASAD Scheme
description: Pilgrimage Rejuvenation and Spiritual Augmentation Drive for developing pilgrimage sites.

name: HRIDAY Scheme
description: National Heritage City Development and Augmentation Yojana for preserving heritage cities.

name: Khelo India Programme
description: Promotes sports culture by identifying and nurturing young talent.

name: Fit India Movement
description: Encourages citizens to adopt healthy lifestyles and fitness practices.

name: National Mission on Libraries
description: Modernizes public libraries to provide digital access and resources.

name: Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat
description: Promotes cultural exchange and national integration among states and union territories.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Promotes gender equality and education for girl children.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Provides financial assistance to pregnant and lactating women for wage loss compensation.

name: Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS)
description: Provides nutrition, health, and preschool education services to children under 6 years and mothers.

name: One Stop Centre Scheme
description: Provides integrated support services to women affected by violence.

name: Working Women Hostel Scheme
description: Provides safe and affordable accommodation for working women.

name: National Creche Scheme
description: Provides daycare facilities for children of working mothers.

name: Mahila Shakti Kendra
description: Empowers rural women through community participation and skill development.

name: Ujjawala Scheme
description: Provides prevention, rescue, rehabilitation, and reintegration services for victims of trafficking.

name: Child Protection Services Scheme
description: Ensures care, protection, and rehabilitation of children in need.

name: National Nutrition Mission (POSHAN Abhiyaan)
description: Improves nutritional outcomes for children, pregnant women, and lactating mothers.

name: Bharatmala Pariyojana
description: National highway development program to improve road connectivity across India.

name: Sagarmala Programme
description: Port-led development initiative to modernize ports and promote coastal shipping.

name: Smart Cities Mission
description: Develops 100 smart cities with sustainable urban infrastructure and technology-driven governance.

name: Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation (AMRUT)
description: Provides basic urban infrastructure like water supply, sewerage, and green spaces.

name: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY)
description: Provides all-weather road connectivity to unconnected rural habitations.

name: Regional Connectivity Scheme - UDAN
description: Enhances regional air connectivity by making air travel affordable.

name: Metro Rail Projects
description: Supports metro rail systems in major cities to improve urban transport.

name: National Infrastructure Pipeline
description: Provides a roadmap for investment in infrastructure projects across sectors.

name: Industrial Corridors Programme
description: Develops industrial corridors to boost manufacturing and logistics infrastructure.

name: Dedicated Freight Corridor Project
description: Constructs freight-only railway corridors to improve goods transport efficiency.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Provides universal access to banking facilities with zero-balance accounts.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban)
description: Provides affordable housing for urban poor through subsidies and loans.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Gramin)
description: Provides pucca houses to rural households living in kutcha houses.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Provides fixed pension to unorganized sector workers after retirement.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
description: Provides free LPG connections to women from below poverty line households.

name: National Social Assistance Programme
description: Provides financial assistance to elderly, widows, and disabled persons.

name: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana
description: Provides free food grains to poor families under the National Food Security Act.

name: Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana
description: Provides pension benefits to senior citizens through LIC-managed scheme.

name: National Family Benefit Scheme
description: Provides lump sum assistance to families living below poverty line on the death of the breadwinner.

name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-Dhan
description: Provides pension benefits to unorganized workers after retirement.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Provides skill training to youth to enhance employability and entrepreneurship.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Facilitates bank loans to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs for setting up enterprises.

name: Startup India
description: Promotes innovation and entrepreneurship through tax benefits and funding support.

name: National Career Service (NCS)
description: Provides employment services including job matching, career counseling, and skill training.

name: Prime Minister’s Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
description: Credit-linked subsidy program to generate self-employment opportunities through micro-enterprises.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
description: Skill development program for rural youth to enhance employability.

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
description: Provides financial support to establishments to promote apprenticeship training.

name: Skill India Mission
description: Umbrella program to train over 40 crore people in different skills by 2022.

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
description: Provides guaranteed 100 days of wage employment to rural households.

name: National Skill Development Mission
description: Coordinates skill development efforts across ministries and industries.

name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
description: Provides free health coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year.

name: National Health Mission
description: Strengthens healthcare delivery across rural and urban areas.

name: Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojana
description: Establishes AIIMS-like institutions and upgrades government medical colleges.

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana
description: Promotes institutional delivery among poor pregnant women.

name: National AIDS Control Programme
description: Prevention and control of HIV/AIDS through awareness and treatment.

name: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram
description: Early identification and treatment of children with health conditions.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Cancer, Diabetes, Cardiovascular Diseases and Stroke
description: Provides preventive, diagnostic, and treatment services for non-communicable diseases.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ayushman Bharat Health Infrastructure Mission
description: Strengthens public health infrastructure across India.

name: National Mental Health Programme
description: Provides community-based mental health services and awareness.

name: National Vector Borne Disease Control Programme
description: Prevention and control of malaria, dengue, chikungunya, and other vector-borne diseases.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
description: Provides income support of ₹6,000 per year to small and marginal farmers.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Issues soil health cards to farmers to improve productivity through balanced fertilizer use.

name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
description: Promotes efficient irrigation practices to ensure 'Har Khet Ko Pani'.

name: National Agriculture Market (e-NAM)
description: Provides an online trading platform for agricultural commodities.

name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY)
description: Supports state-level projects to improve agricultural productivity and infrastructure.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance scheme to protect farmers against yield losses due to natural calamities.

name: National Mission on Sustainable Agriculture
description: Promotes sustainable practices like soil conservation, water-use efficiency, and organic farming.

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
description: Encourages organic farming through cluster-based approaches.

name: National Food Security Mission (NFSM)
description: Aims to increase production of rice, wheat, pulses, and coarse cereals sustainably.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maan-Dhan Yojana
description: Provides pension benefits to small and marginal farmers after retirement.
